sentences.arabic: شَعَرَ صَدِيقِي بِأَلَمٍ شَدِيدٍ فِي مَعِدَتِهِ يَوْمَ أَمْسِ.
sentences.translation: Moj prijatelj je jučer osjetio jak bol u stomaku.
sentences.translationEn: My friend felt a severe pain in his stomach yesterday.

sentences.arabic: زَارَ الْمُسْتَشْفَى وَقَابَلَ الطَّبِيبَ الْمُخْتَصَّ لِلْفَحْصِ.
sentences.translation: Posjetio je bolnicu i sastao se sa ljekarom specijalistom radi pregleda.
sentences.translationEn: He visited the hospital and met the specialist doctor for an examination.

sentences.arabic: أَعْطَاهُ الطَّبِيبُ وَصْفَةً طِبِّيَّةً وَطَلَبَ مِنْهُ الرَّاحَةَ التَّامَّةَ.
sentences.translation: Ljekar mu je dao recept i zatražio od njega potpuni odmor.
sentences.translationEn: The doctor gave him a medical prescription and asked him for complete rest.
